3189590.name: Uniframe
3189590.description:
Keep your desktop clean and your focus sharp. This tool lets you group and manage multiple app windows inside one main window.

Whether you’re coding, designing, or researching, you can organize everything you need in one place — no more tab chaos or window juggling.

Highlights:
• Combine multiple windows into one workspace
• Easily switch between active apps
• Drag and resize layouts instantly
• Lightweight and optimized for performance
